title: tittmannia alsinoides
intro: Tittmannia alsinoides, also known as the Tittmannia or Alsine, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Tittmannia alsinoides include relief from urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and cystitis, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. Tittmannia alsinoides is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
